output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?actress ?actressLabel WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P161 wd:Q83410 .
  ?film wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(?releaseDate >= "1940-01-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?releaseDate < "1950-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  ?film wdt:P161 ?actress .
  ?actress wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  FILTER(?actress != wd:Q83410)
  ?actress rdfs:label ?actressLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?actressLabel) = "en")
}
